tags.example:
```tsx
// Default indicator (shows number and checkmark when complete)
<Steps.Indicator />

// Custom content
<Steps.Indicator>
  <MyCustomIcon />
</Steps.Indicator>
```

description:
# Steps.Indicator

Visual marker showing step status (number, icon, or custom content).
Wraps Chakra UI's Steps.Indicator with Nimbus styling.

children.description: Custom content to display in the indicator
children.name: children
